landing.hero_sub: Get step-by-step, science-backed parenting plans personalized for your child — by your AI Parenting Coach.
landing.hero_free: ✨ Free to start · No credit card required
landing.problems_sub: Every parent faces them. Amy Coach helps you solve them — one personalized step at a time.
landing.not_alone: You're not alone — and you don't have to figure it out yourself.
landing.features_heading: Everything You Need for Smarter Parenting
landing.features_sub: One platform. Multiple powerful tools designed for your child.
landing.coach_title: Amy Coach — Solve Real Parenting Challenges
landing.coach_desc: From tantrums to screen time, sleep to focus — Amy Coach gives you deep, personalized step-by-step plans that actually work. No generic advice, only science-backed solutions tailored to your child.
landing.feature_routine_desc: Create structured, personalized routines that help your child build strong habits.
landing.feature_hub_desc: Access activities, insights, and curated parenting guidance in one place.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Ask anything and get instant parenting advice anytime, right when you need it.
landing.mid_cta: Start with Amy Coach and explore more as you grow.
landing.how_sub: Three simple steps to your first personalized parenting plan.
landing.step1_desc: Pick the parenting challenge you want to solve — from tantrums to sleep.
landing.step2_desc: Tell Amy about your child's age, personality, and current habits.
landing.step3_desc: Receive a personalized, science-backed plan you can start today.
landing.trust_heading: Built on Child Psychology & Behavioral Science
landing.trust_sub: Every plan is grounded in proven research — not generic advice. Trust the framework, follow the steps.
landing.trust1_desc: Built on proven principles of how children form lasting habits.
landing.trust2_desc: Evidence-based strategies from top child psychologists.
landing.trust3_desc: Practical parenting frameworks used by experts worldwide.
landing.final_cta_heading: Ready to start your parenting journey?
landing.final_cta_sub: Join AmyNest AI and get a personalized parenting plan in minutes — completely free.
landing.whats_new_sub: Four brand-new zones for every age — from infant care to abacus mastery, from coloring fun to printable worksheets.
landing.new_infant_desc: Pediatrician-aligned guidance on sleep, feeding, milestones and daily care for babies under 12 months.
landing.new_abacus_desc: Step-by-step abacus lessons that build mental math and concentration — perfect for ages 5–12.
landing.new_funsheets_desc: Printable activity sheets — mazes, dot-to-dot, tracing and logic puzzles your child can finish today.
landing.new_coloring_desc: Curated coloring books to build focus, fine motor skills and creative expression — print at home or color in-app.

privacy.md_intro: AmyNest ("the App") is operated by **AmyNest AI, Inc.** ("we", "us"). This policy explains what information we collect when you use the App and how we handle it.
privacy.md_li_1_1: **Account information** you provide when you sign up: name, email address, and authentication identifiers from your sign-in provider.
privacy.md_li_1_2: **Child profile information** you voluntarily enter (first name or nickname, age, interests, routine preferences). We never ask for a child's last name, address, or contact details.
privacy.md_li_1_3: **Routine and task activity** you create or generate inside the App, used to display your dashboard and reward history.
privacy.md_li_1_4: **Technical data** such as device type, OS version, app version, and crash diagnostics, used to keep the App stable.
privacy.md_li_2_1: To provide the core features of the App (generating routines, tracking tasks and rewards, syncing across your devices).
privacy.md_li_2_2: To respond to support requests you send us.
privacy.md_li_2_3: To improve the App's reliability and performance.
privacy.md_p_2: We do **not** sell your personal information. We do **not** show third-party advertising to children inside the App.
privacy.md_p_3: AmyNest is designed to be used by parents and guardians. Child profiles inside the App are managed by a parent account. We collect only the minimum information needed to display a child's routine. Parents may delete a child profile at any time from the App.
privacy.md_p_4: We share data with service providers who help us operate the App (hosting, authentication, analytics, AI generation). These providers are bound by contracts to use your data only on our behalf. We may also disclose information if required by law.
privacy.md_p_5: You can delete your account and all associated data at any time from inside the App, or by emailing **support@amynest.ai**. Backups are removed within 30 days.
privacy.md_h2_6: 6. Permissions used by the mobile app
privacy.md_li_6_1: **Internet / Network state** — required to load the App.
privacy.md_li_6_2: **Camera, Microphone, Photos** — only requested at the moment you use a feature that needs them (e.g. uploading a child's profile picture). Always optional.

tutorial.slide1_body: Your AI co-parent for stress-free mornings, smoother evenings, and routines that actually stick.
tutorial.slide2_body: Tell Amy about your child once. She builds the right schedule each day — and shifts it when life happens.
tutorial.slide3_body: Optional nudges keep your family on track without feeling pushy. You stay in control.

onboarding_chat.amy_intro: Hi {{name}}! I'm Amy, your parenting coach. Let me set up your profile — it'll take about 2 minutes!
onboarding_chat.amy_first_q: Let's start — what's your child's name?
onboarding_chat.amy_dob_q: Nice! When is {{name}}'s date of birth?
onboarding_chat.amy_diet_notes_q: Any religious or cultural diet notes? (Jain, Halal, Kosher, Sattvik, etc.) Skip if none.
onboarding_chat.ph_diet_notes: e.g. Jain, Halal, Kosher, no onion/garlic...
onboarding_chat.infant_dob_reply:
{{name}} is still a baby — how sweet! 🍼

Every child is different at this age — we'll adapt learning based on flexible routines.

How is {{name}} being fed right now? (optional, you can skip)
onboarding_chat.amy_feeding_q: How is {{name}} being fed right now? (optional, you can skip)
onboarding_chat.feeding_reply: Got it! 😊 How would you describe {{name}}'s sleep pattern?
onboarding_chat.skip_sleep_reply: No problem! How would you describe {{name}}'s sleep pattern?
onboarding_chat.amy_infant_sleep_q: How would you describe {{name}}'s sleep pattern?
onboarding_chat.amy_more_q: Got it! Do you have another child to add?
onboarding_chat.amy_next_child_q: Great! What's the next child's name?
onboarding_chat.amy_role_q: Nice to meet you, {{name}}! What's your role?
onboarding_chat.region_indian_drilldown: Which Indian cuisine does your family prefer?
onboarding_chat.amy_mobile_q: 📱 What's your mobile number for reminders? (You can skip this.)
onboarding_chat.amy_allergies_q: 🌾 Any food allergies to avoid in meal plans? (Skip if none.)
onboarding_chat.amy_save_error: Something went wrong saving your profile. Please try again.
onboarding_chat.saving_title: Amy is setting up your profile...
onboarding_chat.error_sub: We couldn't save your profile. Check your connection and try again.
onboarding_chat.notif_subtitle: Amy can remind you about routines, bedtime, and meals — right on time, every day.

onboarding_chat.notif_benefit_bedtime: Bedtime alerts for a calm night routine

nutrition.ebf_desc: WHO recommends only breast milk for the first 6 months. No other food or water is needed.
nutrition.ebf_hi: विश्व स्वास्थ्य संगठन 6 महीने तक केवल माँ के दूध की सलाह देता है।
nutrition.family_desc: Cook one meal for the whole family and serve age-appropriate portions. No separate cooking needed!
nutrition.katori_note: * 1 katori ≈ 150ml cup. Adjust to child's appetite.
nutrition.score_tab_title: 🏆 Daily Nutrition Score · दैनिक पोषण स्कोर
nutrition.score_tab_sub: Track for {{label}} · आज क्या खाया वो चेक करें
nutrition.tip_low: Boost your nutrition — add dal, a fruit, and a glass of milk. · दाल, फल और दूध जरूर लें।
nutrition.tip_med: Include green vegetables like palak or methi. · पालक/मेथी जरूर खाएं।
nutrition.tip_high: Almost there! Replace a packaged snack with roasted chana. · भुने चने खाएं।
nutrition.outstanding_sub: Consistency is the key to health. Keep it up tomorrow too! · हर दिन यही करें!
nutrition.section_nutrient_desc: Tap a nutrient to see benefits, Indian food sources & daily needs for {{label}}.
nutrition.section_meal_plan: Weekly Meal Plan · साप्ताहिक भोजन योजना
nutrition.section_meal_desc: Age-appropriate Indian meals for every day of the week.
nutrition.section_family_desc: Same meal — different portions for each family member. Cook once, serve smart!
nutrition.source_footer: 📚 Source: ICMR-NIN Nutrient Requirements for Indians (2020) & WHO Guidelines
